hero.description: Browse jobs and see exactly how much you'll earn. No surprises.
hero.cta_desc: Click on any job listing to see a precise calculation of your net salary – including housing, insurance, and ET Regeling.

roadmap.title: Onboarding Roadmap
roadmap.step2_desc: Required for NL employment contract. Safe and encrypted.
roadmap.not_ready: You are not ready for the appointment!
roadmap.welcome_sub: track your progress toward a new beginning.
roadmap.my_nav_sub: All important addresses for your arrival.
roadmap.help_desc: Your coordinator is available 24/7. If you're unsure about documents or travel, give us a call.
roadmap.info_desc: Don't forget that to obtain a BSN number, you must have an original birth certificate in an international format.

about.title: Bringing fairness to work in the Netherlands.
about.description: GoNL is not just another job portal. We are a digital bridge between you and the best Dutch employers. Our goal is total transparency – from the first click in the calculator to signing the contract directly in the app.
about.feature1_desc: What you see in the calculator is what you get. No paycheck surprises.
about.feature2_desc: Handle everything from your mobile. From identity verification to uploading your ticket.

footer.description: Modern platform for recruiting people from the Czech and Slovak Republics to the Netherlands. Transparently, digitally, and without unnecessary paperwork.
footer.rights: © 2026 GoNL Enterprise B.V. All rights reserved.

guide.title: Journey Guide
guide.subtitle: Everything you need for a smooth arrival and start in the Netherlands.

docs.subtitle: Ensure you have all physical documents for the BSN appointment.
